articles.title_en: Omnicom Launches Agentic AI Tool to Auto-Fix Influencer Content
articles.title_zh: Omnicom 推出 agentic AI 工具自动修正网红内容
articles.content_en: Omnicom has released an influencer brand-safety tool powered by Google's Gemini and Veo models that automatically adjusts creator content to meet brand standards. The tool runs an agent loop over submitted assets, flagging and rewriting elements that fall outside brand guidelines before they go live. Agencies no longer need manual review rounds for every piece of UGC.
articles.content_zh: Omnicom 发布由 Google Gemini 和 Veo 驱动的网红品牌安全工具，可自动调整创作者内容使其符合品牌规范。该工具在提交素材上运行 agent loop，在内容上线前标记并重写违规部分，无需人工逐件审核 UGC。
articles.so_what_en: Ask your influencer agency or platform vendor whether they have an equivalent agentic brand-safety layer. If not, shortlist this Omnicom offering or test Gemini-based scripts on your own brand-guidelines doc before your next campaign.
articles.so_what_zh: 向合作网红代理或平台询问是否有同类 agentic 品牌安全审核层。若无，在下次活动前先用 Gemini 脚本跑一遍自家品牌规范文档做内部测试。

articles.title_en: Goodway Group and Optable Partner to Pipe Cleaner Data to AI Agents
articles.title_zh: Goodway Group 与 Optable 合作为 AI agent 提供更干净的数据
articles.content_en: Goodway Group and Optable announced a partnership to feed vetted first-party and clean-room data directly into AI agents running ad-buying workflows. The deal addresses a core failure point: agents making programmatic decisions on incomplete or mismatched identifiers. Clean data input is now the prerequisite for any agentic media-buying stack.
articles.content_zh: Goodway Group 与 Optable 宣布合作，将经过验证的第一方数据和 clean room 数据直接输入负责广告购买工作流的 AI agent。此次合作针对核心痛点：agent 在不完整或错配 ID 上做程序化决策。干净的数据输入已成为 agentic 媒体购买技术栈的前提条件。
articles.so_what_en: Before deploying any AI agent in your media-buying stack, audit the data pipeline first: mismatched IDs will make agent decisions worse than manual ones.
articles.so_what_zh: 在媒体购买技术栈中部署 AI agent 前，先审查数据管道：ID 错配会让 agent 决策比人工更差。

articles.title_en: OpenAI and Microsoft Amend Long-Term Partnership Agreement
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 与 Microsoft 修订长期合作协议
articles.content_en: OpenAI and Microsoft announced an amended partnership agreement that restructures commercial terms and extends their collaboration runway. The update gives OpenAI more flexibility to pursue enterprise deals independently while Microsoft retains preferred-partner status and Azure integration rights. The exact revenue-share figures were not disclosed.
articles.content_zh: OpenAI 与 Microsoft 宣布修订合作协议，重构商业条款并延长合作期限。新协议赋予 OpenAI 更大空间独立开拓企业客户，Microsoft 保留优先合作伙伴地位和 Azure 集成权利。具体收益分成数字未披露。

articles.title_en: Wanxing Tech 2025 Revenue Hits 1.53B CNY; AI-Native Apps Up 90%
articles.title_zh: 万兴科技 2025 年营收 15.3 亿元，AI 原生应用收入增超 90%
articles.content_en: Wanxing Technology reported 2025 revenue of 1.533 billion CNY, up 6.46% YoY, with losses narrowing 44.19%. The video-creative unit contributed 1.02 billion CNY. AI-native app revenue grew over 90% YoY and mobile revenue grew over 60%, signaling that AI-powered creative tools are now the company's fastest-growing segment.
articles.content_zh: 万兴科技公告 2025 年营收 15.33 亿元，同比增 6.46%，归母净利减亏 44.19%。核心视频创意业务营收 10.2 亿元，AI 原生应用收入同比增超 90%，移动端收入同比增超 60%，AI 驱动的创意工具已成为公司增速最快的业务板块。
articles.so_what_en: Creative SaaS with an AI-native product line is pulling clear of legacy feature sets. Evaluate whether your current creative-tool vendors are growing their AI tiers at comparable rates or falling behind.
articles.so_what_zh: 带 AI 原生产品线的创意 SaaS 正与传统功能拉开差距。评估你现有创意工具供应商的 AI 板块增速是否跟得上，否则考虑迁移。

articles.title_en: MIT Tech Review: Businesses Still Can't Bridge AI Hype and Real Profit
articles.title_zh: MIT Technology Review：企业仍无法弥合 AI 炒作与实际盈利之间的鸿沟
articles.content_en: MIT Technology Review's The Algorithm newsletter argues that most organizations have moved from AI experimentation to broader deployment but still lack a reliable path from AI investment to measurable revenue lift. The piece points to a missing operational layer: companies can demo AI outputs but cannot yet tie them to P&L lines. No specific benchmark numbers are cited.
articles.content_zh: MIT Technology Review 旗下 The Algorithm 时事通讯指出，多数企业已从 AI 试验转向大规模部署，但仍缺乏将 AI 投入转化为可量化营收增长的可靠路径。文章指向缺失的运营层：企业能演示 AI 输出，但尚无法将其与损益表直接挂钩。文中未引用具体数据。

articles.title_en: StepFun Joins 'Qianli Alliance' With Chip Maker to Target Auto AI
articles.title_zh: 阶跃星辰加入「千里联盟」，与芯片厂商联手布局汽车 AI
articles.content_en: Ahead of the Beijing Auto Show, chipmaker Aixia Yuanzhi joined forces with Qianli Technology and StepFun to form the 'Qianli Alliance', targeting automotive AI applications. Aixia plans to ship the M97 high-compute driving chip in Q3 2026, designed with significantly higher DDR bandwidth than current mainstream chips. The alliance signals that Chinese AI labs are now embedding directly into automotive supply chains.
articles.content_zh: 北京车展前，爱芯元智联合千里科技和阶跃星辰成立「千里联盟」，主攻汽车 AI 应用。爱芯元智计划于 2026 年三季度发布高算力辅助驾驶芯片 M97，DDR 带宽显著高于现有主流芯片。此次联盟表明，中国 AI 大模型厂商正直接嵌入汽车供应链。

articles.title_en: Hands-on: GPT 5.5, Claude Design, and GPT Images 2.0 Compared
articles.title_zh: 实测对比：GPT 5.5、Claude Design 与 GPT Images 2.0
articles.content_en: Lenny's 'How I AI' podcast crew ran live tests on three recent releases: GPT 5.5, Claude Design, and GPT Images 2.0, plus an inside look at Memelord for meme-driven content. The episode offers practitioner-level verdicts on which tools hold up for real marketing workflows rather than benchmark scores.
articles.content_zh: Lenny 旗下播客《How I AI》团队对三款近期产品进行了实测：GPT 5.5、Claude Design 和 GPT Images 2.0，并深入评测了 Memelord 的 meme 内容创作能力。节目提供的是从业者视角的使用结论，而非单纯的 benchmark 数据。
articles.so_what_en: Before locking in your AI creative stack, listen to this episode for practitioner verdicts on GPT Images 2.0 vs. Claude Design — they cover exactly the image-generation and brand-consistency gaps that affect campaign output.
articles.so_what_zh: 在确定 AI 创意工具组合前，听这期节目了解 GPT Images 2.0 与 Claude Design 的实测差距，重点关注影响投放素材质量的图像生成和品牌一致性表现。

articles.title_en: Choco Deploys OpenAI Agents to Automate Food Distribution Ops
articles.title_zh: Choco 用 OpenAI agent 自动化食品分发流程
articles.content_en: Choco, a food distribution platform, built AI agents on OpenAI APIs to streamline order management and supplier communication. The deployment cut manual processing time and unlocked growth capacity without adding headcount. OpenAI published the case as a first-party customer story in April 2026.
articles.content_zh: 食品分发平台 Choco 基于 OpenAI API 构建 AI agent，用于自动处理订单和供应商沟通。部署后削减了人工处理时长，在不增加人手的情况下释放增长空间。OpenAI 于 2026 年 4 月发布该客户案例。
articles.so_what_en: B2B SaaS and distribution-heavy businesses: map your highest-volume repetitive ops (order intake, supplier follow-up, status updates) and scope an agent pilot against one workflow before Q3.
articles.so_what_zh: B2B 和重分发业务：盘点订单录入、供应商跟进等高频重复流程，在 Q3 前选一个跑 agent 试点。

articles.title_en: Time Pin: GeoGuessr Format Applied to Historical Characters
articles.title_zh: Time Pin：把 GeoGuessr 玩法套进历史人物猜测游戏
articles.content_en: Indie developer launched Time Pin on CrazyGames, a browser game where players guess the era and location of a historical character using environmental photo clues and up to 5 AI-answered questions from a pool of 12. Correct guesses unlock educational resources on culture and era. Posted on Show HN in April 2026 with early traction.
articles.content_zh: 独立开发者在 CrazyGames 上线 Time Pin，玩家根据环境图片线索和最多 5 个 AI 回答的问题猜测历史人物的时代与地点，答对后解锁文化教育资料。2026 年 4 月发布于 Show HN。
articles.so_what_en: Established quiz or edtech brands: the 'constrained question pool' mechanic (12 available, pick 5) drives replayability cheaply — test it as an interactive lead-gen format.
articles.so_what_zh: 教育或测验类产品：'有限问题池'机制（12 选 5）低成本提升复玩率，可作为互动 lead-gen 形式测试。

articles.title_en: OpenAI Ad Pilot: Marketers Join on FOMO, ROI Still Unclear
articles.title_zh: OpenAI广告内测:FOMO驱动入场,价值待验证
articles.content_en:
## Background & Numbers
OpenAI launched a private ad pilot and marketers are joining weeks in, driven largely by fear of missing out rather than proven performance data. As of late April 2026, no clear signal exists on whether the platform delivers measurable ROI.

## Breakdown
1. **FOMO is the primary acquisition lever** OpenAI is filling its pilot roster through competitive anxiety, not case studies or reach guarantees.
2. **No performance data published yet** Weeks post-launch, there are no reported CTR, CPM, or conversion benchmarks from the platform.
3. **First-mover positioning is the real bet** Brands entering now are buying learning time and relationship capital, not proven media efficiency.

## How to Apply
- [ ] Define your entry rationale clearly: learning or media buying
- [ ] Set a hard test budget cap before joining
- [ ] Request benchmark data from the platform before renewing spend
articles.content_zh:
## 背景与数据
OpenAI 推出私测广告平台,营销人入场的主要驱动力是 FOMO 而非实际效果数据。截至 2026 年 4 月底,平台尚未公布任何可量化的 ROI 指标。

## 问题拆解
1. **FOMO 是 OpenAI 的拉新武器** 竞争焦虑代替案例和流量保证,成为招募测试用户的核心手段。
2. **零公开 benchmark 数据** 上线数周,CTR、CPM、转化率均无官方披露。
3. **先发是买学习时间,不是买流量** 现阶段入场的品牌在押注关系资本和平台摸索期。

## 你可以怎么用
- [ ] 明确入场目的:学习还是换量
- [ ] 提前锁定测试预算上限
- [ ] 要 benchmark 数据再决定续投
articles.so_what_en: Enter new AI ad platforms with a capped test budget and a clear learning goal, not competitive anxiety.
articles.so_what_zh: 进新 AI 广告平台前,先定预算上限和学习目标,别靠 FOMO 做决策。
